assignments.name: rejection_message
assignments.value: Hola 👋, el recibo está borroso. ¿Podrías enviar una imagen más clara? ¡Gracias!

parameters.jsonBody: ={"contents":[{"parts":[{"text":"Read the barcode in this image. Reply ONLY as JSON, no markdown, no backticks:\n{\"barcode_gtin\":\"string or null\",\"barcode_confidence\":95,\"tampering_detected\":false}"},{"file_data":{"mime_type":"image/jpeg","file_uri":"{{ $('Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.record.barcode_url }}"}}]}]}

={"contents":[{"parts":[{"text":"Read the expiry date on this product. Date format MUST be YYYY-MM-DD. Reply ONLY as JSON, no markdown, no backticks:\n{\"expiry_date\":\"YYYY-MM-DD or null\",\"expiry_confidence\":95,\"tampering_detected\":false}"},{"file_data":{"mime_type":"image/jpeg","file_uri":"{{ $('Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.record.expiry_url }}"}}]}]}
